# All Abode Property Solutions

> All Abode, operated by All Abode Brokerage and Valuation OPC, is a PRC-licensed Philippine real estate firm offering brokerage, leasing, property management, valuation/appraisal, and documentation assistance. Based in Makati City, serving Metro Manila, Cebu, and Davao.

All brokerage and valuation services are performed under the supervision of duly licensed real estate service practitioners. Property details, pricing, and availability on this site are subject to verification.

## Services

- [Brokerage](https://allabodeph.com/property-solutions/brokerage): Buying, selling, and marketing of resale units, house and lots, lots, condominiums, commercial spaces, offices, industrial properties, and parking slots.
- [Leasing](https://allabodeph.com/property-solutions/leasing): Residential, long-term, short-stay, and bedspace leasing, plus commercial, office, warehouse, and parking leases.
- [Property Management](https://allabodeph.com/property-solutions/property-management): Rent collection, maintenance coordination, cleaning, furnishing, fit-out, turnover, and owner support.
- [Valuation & Appraisal](https://allabodeph.com/valuation): Professional valuation and appraisal for residential, commercial, office, industrial, and investment properties.
- [Documentation Assistance](https://allabodeph.com/property-solutions/documentation-assistance): Title transfer coordination, tax payment assistance, notarial coordination, and property document processing.
